heading: Omitted
label: 1265 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which authorized the Secretary of the Interior to prescribe rules and regulations to carry out the provisions of this subchapter, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–254, § 586 Stat. 65Mar. 18, 1972
